message:
feat(macros): add phone/contains/starts_with/ends_with validators, improve error messages

- Add #[validate(phone)] for basic phone number format validation
- Add #[validate(contains = "...")] for substring checks
- Add #[validate(starts_with = "...")] and #[validate(ends_with = "...")]
- Improve JsonSchema derive error for tuple structs with span info
- 12 new integration tests for new validators (bd-x29b, bd-22fh)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
